# LBL Bau

LBL Bau is a regional construction and renovation company based in Heldenstein, Bavaria, Germany.

Website: https://www.lblbau.de
Phone: 0173 4593296
Email: kontakt@lbl-bau.de
Address: Kuehamer Str. 2, 84431 Heldenstein, Germany

Core services:
- Renovierung
- Innenausbau
- Fassadenarbeiten
- Trockenbau
- Pflasterarbeiten
- Hausbau and smaller to medium-sized construction projects

Service area:
- Heldenstein
- Waldkraiburg
- Mühldorf am Inn
- Ampfing
- Kraiburg am Inn
- Landkreis Mühldorf
- Oberbayern

Positioning:
LBL Bau focuses on reliable local construction work, clean execution, careful planning, premium renovation quality, and direct personal communication.

Important pages:
- Homepage: https://www.lblbau.de
- Impressum: https://www.lblbau.de/impressum
- Datenschutz: https://www.lblbau.de/datenschutz
